chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-397 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For Hearing of CMA 1738/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 24-09-2025 Mr. Sarfraz Magsi, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Shafique Ahmed Leghari, Advocate for respondent No.5. M/s Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G a/w SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur and SIP/I.O Sikandar Ali Dahri P.S, Salehpat. ***** Learned Law Officers file statements of respondents No.2&4 along with a copy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded by I.O. on 18.09.2025, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioners. Investigating Officer, P.S, Salehpat is present and submits that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 who has reiterated her marriage with petitioner No.2 and stated that FIR was registered with false facts; therefore, he will file a report before concerned Magistrate disposing of the case under C-class. After such statement, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of this petition with further prayer that directions may be issued for protection. Under the above circumstances, the I.O is directed to submit report, as suggested by him within 15 days before the Court having jurisdiction. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. The petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
